author: elad-simbalista
name: Seq2048 + EMA + per-row GPTQ-lite int6
blurb: FineWeb sp1024 9x512 KV4 run with TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=2048, MLP_MULT=3, Muon momentum warmup, extended warmdown, EMA finalization, sliding-window eval, and per-row GPTQ-lite int6 quantization. The attached canonical run exported as int6+zlib-9 and finished under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
